Prompt
U
Oracle Events
Searched Emails for Rachel's Relocation Request: The agent executed `search_emails` (query: "Terraform relocation" or "Rachel Nguyen") and discovered email from rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com containing three relocation requests: (1) Priya Dasgupta, Sr. Data Engineer, Austin → Chicago, first week of May; (2) Marcus Liu, Product Designer, Portland → New York, ~May 12; (3) Samantha Obi, DevOps, Denver → San Francisco, ~May 8.
Searched Emails for Other Terraform Domain Correspondence: The agent executed `search_emails` (query: "terraformdigital.com") to find any other Terraform-domain emails from the last two weeks, discovering the onboarding thread and the forward/ownership exchange with David Chen.
Searched CRM for Terraform Company and David's Notes: The agent executed `crm_search_companies` (name: "Terraform" or "Vantage") to find company `company-terraform-digital` (display name: Vantage Distributed), and then executed `crm_list_engagements` (company_ids: ["company-terraform-digital"]) to find engagement `engagement-terraform-replyall-incident` documenting the Reply-All incident where internal pricing was leaked to Rachel Nguyen, with Mina Hashimoto assigned as dedicated AM.
Checked Airtable for Existing Terraform Client Profile: The agent executed `airtable_search_records` (value: "Terraform Digital") and found record `recTerraformDigital01` in the Client Accounts table, confirming Mina Hashimoto is already assigned as Account Manager, the contract is an Enterprise Relocation Package, and the three relocations (Priya Dasgupta, Marcus Liu, Samantha Obi) are noted.
Checked Linear for Existing Terraform Tickets: The agent executed `linear_list_issues` (query: "Terraform") to check whether any relocation tickets or project board items already exist for the three employees. No dedicated Terraform relocation tickets were found.
Looked Up Contact Info for Recipients: The agent executed `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Mina Hashimoto"), `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "David Chen"), and `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Samira Tariq") to retrieve email addresses: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com, david.chen@moveops.com, and samira.tariq@moveops.com.
Sent Slack Message to David Chen: The agent executed `conversations_add_message` (or sent a DM via Slack) to David Chen confirming that the Terraform account is being handed over to Mina, exactly as David asked.
Sent Email to Mina Hashimoto: The agent executed `send_email` to mina.hashimoto@moveops.com containing the full relocation details for Priya Dasgupta (Austin → Chicago, first week of May), Marcus Liu (Portland → New York, ~May 12), and Samantha Obi (Denver → San Francisco, ~May 8), explicitly stating that the pricing proposal Rachel requested is now Mina's responsibility, and including a heads-up about the AWS cost fallout ($42,870 March bill, ~47,000 document uploads) from the Terraform onboarding so Mina is not blindsided.
Sent Apology Email to Samira Tariq: The agent executed `send_email` to samira.tariq@moveops.com with a casual apology incorporating the exact $42,870 March AWS bill amount and 47,000 document upload count discovered during the Slack investigation.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Searched Emails for Other Terraform Domain Correspondence: The agent executed `search_emails` (query: "terraformdigital.com") to find any other Terraform-domain emails from the last two weeks, discovering the onboarding thread and the forward/ownership exchange with David Chen.
Searched CRM for Terraform Company and David's Notes: The agent executed `crm_search_companies` (name: "Terraform" or "Vantage") to find company `company-terraform-digital` (display name: Vantage Distributed), and then executed `crm_list_engagements` (company_ids: ["company-terraform-digital"]) to find engagement `engagement-terraform-replyall-incident` documenting the Reply-All incident where internal pricing was leaked to Rachel Nguyen, with Mina Hashimoto assigned as dedicated AM.
